//: Coverage scope (SPEC QA-02). The 80% line gate measures the PURE adapter/safety logic that unit tests can exercise outside the Electron host: engine/*, safety/*, and the pure config modules (resolver, templates, editorconfig). The vscode-importing glue (extension.ts, providers/*, commands/*, config/vscodeConfig.ts) cannot be unit-tested without a VS Code host and is verified by the headless integration tier (QA-04), so it is excluded here to avoid diluting the unit-coverage signal. types.ts is type-only (no runtime code). This file overrides package.json's c8 field without editing package.json.
